title: Grade Calculator - GPA Calculator - Free Online Letter Grade Calculator
subject: Subject
error: Please add at least one subject with valid scores
seoDesc: Free online grade calculator and GPA calculator. Add your subjects, scores, and weights to calculate your average score, GPA on a 4.0 scale, and letter grade. Perfect for students tracking their academic performance.
seoHowToDesc: To calculate your weighted grade, multiply each subject score by its weight percentage, add all results, and divide by the total weight. The GPA is calculated by converting letter grades to grade points (A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0.0) and averaging them.
seoDescription: Calculate your class grade, final exam score, and cumulative GPA with this free grade calculator. Enter your current grade, desired grade, and exam weight to find out what you need on your final. Perfect for students planning their academic success.
